title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source command-line tool that enables rapid development and production deployment of AI agents with built-in sandboxing, audit trails, and identity management. The tool integrates with AI coding assistants like Claude and provides a skills-based system for composing agent capabilities.
writeup: Cole Medin covers Google's open-source Agents CLI, a tool for building and deploying production-grade AI agents. The CLI provides sandboxed execution, audit trails, and identity management, and it integrates with coding assistants such as Claude. The walkthrough spans the agent development workflow from local testing through production deployment.
